diagnosis: Saved .linkedin-li-at (len=152, written 2026-06-05) is invalidated server-side. With the cookie, /feed/ 302-redirects to itself (infinite loop = ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS on every LinkedIn URL); with no cookie it cleanly 302s to /uas/login. Recognized-but-rejected token = expired/revoked session, almost certainly killed by LinkedIn on datacenter-IP egress (shared browser is on the VM datacenter IP; resolver stayed authed via the residential proxy this task was told not to use).
remediation: Refresh li_at from a real logged-in LinkedIn browser session (ideally egressing from the same residential IP as where the token was issued), OR route _easyapply_probe.py through the residential proxy. Then re-run this dry-run recon.

rows.note: li_at session invalid (ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS self-loop); could not reach job page
